{"filepath": "src/System/Agents/TUI/Types.hs", "content": "{-# LANGUAGE OverloadedRecordDot #-}
{-# LANGUAGE OverloadedStrings #-}
{-# LANGUAGE TemplateHaskell #-}

-- | Core types and data structures for the TUI application.
module System.Agents.TUI.Types where

import Brick.BChan (BChan)
import Brick.Focus (FocusRing, focusRing)
import Brick.Widgets.Edit (Editor, editorText)
import Brick.Widgets.FileBrowser (FileBrowser)
import Brick.Widgets.List (List, list)
import Control.Concurrent (ThreadId)
import Control.Concurrent.Async (Async)
import Control.Concurrent.STM (TQueue, TVar, newTVarIO)
import Control.Lens (makeLenses)
import Data.Aeson (Value)
import Data.Map.Strict (Map)
import qualified Data.Map.Strict as Map
import Data.Maybe (listToMaybe)
import Data.Set (Set)
import qualified Data.Set as Set
import Data.Text (Text)
import Data.Time (UTCTime)
import qualified Data.Vector as Vector

import System.Agents.AgentTree (LoadedApiKeys, OSAgentNode, OSAgentTree)
import System.Agents.Base (AgentId, ConversationId (..))
import System.Agents.Media.Types (MediaAttachment)
import System.Agents.Runtime.Trace (Trace)
import System.Agents.Session.Base
import System.Agents.SessionStore (SessionStore)
import System.Agents.ToolRegistration (ToolRegistration)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Widget Names
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Widget names for the TUI focus ring and viewport management.
data WidgetName
    = -- | Agent list in the left sidebar
      AgentListWidget
    | -- | Agent information/details panel
      AgentInfoWidget
    | -- | Conversation list in the left sidebar
      ConversationListWidget
    | -- | Saved sessions list in the History tab
      SessionsListWidget
    | -- | Message editor input area
      MessageEditorWidget
    | -- | Main conversation display viewport
      ConversationViewWidget
    | -- | Session content display viewport
      SessionViewWidget
    | -- | For viewport scrolling during turn navigation
      TurnNavigationWidget
    | -- | For focusing the queued messages list
      QueuedMessageListWidget
    | -- | For the attachment list below the message editor
      AttachmentListWidget
    | -- | For the file path input dialog
      FilePathInputWidget
    deriving (Show, Eq, Ord)

-- | Type alias for widget names.
type N = WidgetName

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Tab Types
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Tabs available in the TUI interface.
data Tab
    = AgentsTab
    | ChatsTab
    | HistoryTab
    | HelpTab
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Status Message Types
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Severity level for status messages.
data StatusSeverity
    = StatusInfo
    | StatusWarning
    | StatusError
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-- | A status message with timestamp for auto-clear logic.
data StatusMessage = StatusMessage
    { statusText :: Text
    , statusSeverity :: StatusSeverity
    , statusTimestamp :: UTCTime
    }
    deriving (Show)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Turn Navigation Types
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | State for turn-by-turn navigation
data TurnNavigationState = TurnNavigationState
    { _navSession :: Session
    -- ^ The session being navigated
    , _navSelectedTurnIndex :: Int
    -- ^ Currently selected turn index (0-based)
    , _navTotalTurns :: Int
    -- ^ Total number of turns for display
    }
    deriving (Show)

makeLenses ''TurnNavigationState

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Attachment Dialog State
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | State for the file attachment dialog
data AttachmentDialogState
    = -- | No dialog is open
      AttachmentDialogClosed
    | -- | Path input dialog is open (legacy text input)
      AttachmentDialogPathInput
    | -- | FileBrowser widget dialog is open
      AttachmentDialogFileBrowser
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Application Events
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Events that can be sent to the TUI application.
data AppEvent
    = AppEvent_Heartbeat
    | AppEvent_AgentStepProgrress ConversationId Session
    | AppEvent_AgentNeedsInput ConversationId
    | AppEvent_AgentTrace Trace
    | AppEvent_ShowStatus StatusSeverity Text
    | AppEvent_ClearStatus
    | -- ** Subcall Events for TUI visibility
      -- | A subcall conversation has started
      AppEvent_SubcallStarted
        { appSubcallParentId :: ConversationId
        , appSubcallId :: ConversationId
        , appSubcallAgentSlug :: Text
        , appSubcallDepth :: Int
        }
    | -- | A subcall has made progress
      AppEvent_SubcallProgress ConversationId Session
    | -- | A subcall has completed successfully
      AppEvent_SubcallCompleted ConversationId Text
    | -- | A subcall has failed
      AppEvent_SubcallFailed ConversationId Text
    deriving (Show)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Agent Types (OS-Native)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

{- | TUI Agent using OS-native structures.

This structure wraps an OSAgentNode for use in the TUI.
Tools are accessed directly from the node's tools TVar.
-}
data TuiAgent = TuiAgent
    { tuiAgentId :: AgentId
    -- ^ Unique identifier for this agent
    , tuiTree :: OSAgentTree
    -- ^ The agent's tree structure
    , tuiNode :: OSAgentNode
    -- ^ The specific node for this agent
    , tuiSlug :: Text
    -- ^ The agent's slug
    }

-- | Manual Show instance for TuiAgent.
instance Show TuiAgent where
    show agent =
        "TuiAgent {tuiAgentId = "
            ++ show agent.tuiAgentId
            ++ ", tuiSlug = "
            ++ show agent.tuiSlug
            ++ ", tuiTree = <OSAgentTree>, tuiNode = <OSAgentNode>}"

-- | Legacy accessor for backward compatibility.
agentTree :: TuiAgent -> OSAgentTree
agentTree = tuiTree

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Multi-Agent Coordination Types
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Role definition for agents in multi-agent conversations.
data AgentRole
    = -- | Coordinates other agents
      AgentRole_Orchestrator
    | -- | Specialized agent with a specific role description
      AgentRole_Specialist Text
    | -- | General worker agent
      AgentRole_Worker
    | -- | Observes but doesn't initiate
      AgentRole_Observer
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-- | Configuration for an agent's role in multi-agent mode.
data AgentRoleConfig = AgentRoleConfig
    { arcAgentId :: AgentId
    , arcRole :: AgentRole
    , arcCanInitiate :: Bool
    -- ^ Whether this agent can start new conversations
    , arcSubscribesTo :: [AgentId]
    -- ^ Agents this agent listens to for messages
    }
    deriving (Show)

-- | Strategy for coordinating multiple agents.
data CoordinationStrategy
    = -- | Each agent takes turns
      CoordinationStrategy_RoundRobin
    | -- | One agent orchestrates others
      CoordinationStrategy_Hierarchical AgentId
    | -- | Agents collaborate freely
      CoordinationStrategy_Collaborative
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-- | Configuration for multi-agent conversations.
data MultiAgentConfig = MultiAgentConfig
    { maAgents :: [AgentRoleConfig]
    , maCoordinationStrategy :: CoordinationStrategy
    }
    deriving (Show)

-- | Message type for inter-agent communication.
data MessageType
    = -- | Direct message to specific agent
      MessageType_Direct
    | -- | Message to all subscribed agents
      MessageType_Broadcast
    | -- | Response to a previous message
      MessageType_Response
    | -- | Request for action from another agent
      MessageType_Request
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-- | Message sent between agents.
data InterAgentMessage = InterAgentMessage
    { iamFrom :: AgentId
    , iamTo :: AgentId
    , iamType :: MessageType
    , iamContent :: Value
    }
    deriving (Show)

-- | Agent bus for inter-agent communication.
newtype AgentBus = AgentBus
    { busChannels :: TVar (Map AgentId (TQueue InterAgentMessage))
    }

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Layout Configuration
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Layout modes for the TUI display.
data LayoutMode
    = -- | Single agent view (default)
      SingleAgent
    | -- | Split screen vertically
      SplitVertical
    | -- | Split screen horizontally
      SplitHorizontal
    | -- | Grid with rows and columns
      GridLayout Int Int
    | -- | Tabbed interface for switching between agents
      Tabbed
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-- | TUI configuration including layout and theme.
data TUIConfig = TUIConfig
    { tuiTheme :: Theme
    , tuiKeyBindings :: Map Key EventType
    , tuiLayout :: LayoutMode
    }
    deriving (Show)

-- | Theme configuration (placeholder - to be expanded).
newtype Theme = Theme {themeName :: Text}
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-- | Key type for keybindings.
newtype Key = Key Text
    deriving (Show, Eq, Ord)

-- | Event type for keybindings.
newtype EventType = EventType Text
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Conversation Types
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Status of a conversation regarding its execution state.
data ConversationStatus
    = -- | Conversation is currently running (agent is processing)
      ConversationStatus_Active
    | -- | Conversation is waiting for user input
      ConversationStatus_WaitingForInput
    | -- | Conversation is paused (blocks step iteration until unpaused)
      ConversationStatus_Paused
    deriving (Show, Eq)

{- | A conversation with an agent.

Conversations can be either root-level user-initiated conversations
or subcalls (nested agent invocations). Subcall conversations have
additional metadata for TUI visibility and lineage tracking.
-}
data Conversation = Conversation
    { conversationId :: ConversationId
    , conversationAgent :: TuiAgent
    , conversationThreadId :: Maybe ThreadId
    -- ^ Nothing for restored conversations that haven't been continued yet
    , conversationSession :: Maybe Session
    , conversationName :: Text
    , conversationChan :: BChan (Maybe UserQuery)
    , conversationStatus :: ConversationStatus
    -- ^ Current status of the conversation
    , conversationOnProgress :: OnSessionProgress
    -- ^ Callback for session progress updates
    , conversationIsSubcall :: Bool
    -- ^ Whether this is a subcall (nested agent invocation)
    , conversationParentId :: Maybe ConversationId
    -- ^ Parent conversation ID for subcalls (Nothing for root conversations)
    , conversationSubcallDepth :: Int
    -- ^ Subcall nesting depth (0 = root, 1+ = nested)
    }

-- | Manual Show instance for Conversation.
instance Show Conversation where
    show conv =
        "Conversation {conversationId = "
            ++ show conv.conversationId
            ++ ", conversationAgent = "
            ++ show conv.conversationAgent
            ++ ", conversationName = "
            ++ show conv.conversationName
            ++ ", conversationIsSubcall = "
            ++ show conv.conversationIsSubcall
            ++ ", conversationParentId = "
            ++ show conv.conversationParentId
            ++ ", ...}"

-- | Create a root-level conversation (not a subcall).
mkRootConversation ::
    ConversationId ->
    TuiAgent ->
    Maybe ThreadId ->
    Maybe Session ->
    Text ->
    BChan (Maybe UserQuery) ->
    ConversationStatus ->
    OnSessionProgress ->
    Conversation
mkRootConversation convId agent threadId session convName chan status onProgress =
    Conversation
        { conversationId = convId
        , conversationAgent = agent
        , conversationThreadId = threadId
        , conversationSession = session
        , conversationName = convName
        , conversationChan = chan
        , conversationStatus = status
        , conversationOnProgress = onProgress
        , conversationIsSubcall = False
        , conversationParentId = Nothing
        , conversationSubcallDepth = 0
        }

-- | Create a subcall conversation.
mkSubcallConversation ::
    ConversationId ->
    TuiAgent ->
    Maybe ThreadId ->
    Maybe Session ->
    Text ->
    BChan (Maybe UserQuery) ->
    ConversationStatus ->
    OnSessionProgress ->
    ConversationId ->
    -- ^ Parent conversation ID
    Int ->
    -- ^ Subcall depth
    Conversation
mkSubcallConversation convId agent threadId session convName chan status onProgress parentId depth =
    Conversation
        { conversationId = convId
        , conversationAgent = agent
        , conversationThreadId = threadId
        , conversationSession = session
        , conversationName = "↳ " <> convName
        , conversationChan = chan
        , conversationStatus = status
        , conversationOnProgress = onProgress
        , conversationIsSubcall = True
        , conversationParentId = Just parentId
        , conversationSubcallDepth = depth
        }

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Auxiliary Task Types
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Auxiliary tasks running in the background (e.g., external viewers).
data AuxiliaryTask
    = -- | External markdown viewer task
      Viewer
        { viewerAsync :: Async ()
        , viewerConversationId :: ConversationId
        , viewerSessionId :: SessionId
        }

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Session Configuration
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Configuration for TUI sessions.
data SessionConfig = SessionConfig
    { sessionStore :: SessionStore
    -- ^ Storage for sessions
    , sessionApiKeys :: LoadedApiKeys
    -- ^ API keys for agents
    }

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Core State
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

{- | Core state shared across the TUI.

This is stored in a TVar for thread-safe access. It contains
mutable state that needs to be accessed from multiple threads.
-}
data Core = Core
    { coreConversations :: [Conversation]
    -- ^ Active conversations
    , coreAgentTools :: [(AgentId, [ToolRegistration])]
    -- ^ Tools per agent for display
    , coreBufferedMessages :: TVar (Map ConversationId [Text])
    -- ^ Buffered messages per conversation (queued while agent is processing)
    , corePausedConversations :: Set ConversationId
    -- ^ Set of paused conversation IDs
    }

makeLenses ''Core

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- UI State
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

{- | UI-specific state for the TUI.

This contains all the visual/interaction state that doesn't need
to be thread-safe and is only accessed from the UI thread.
-}
data UIState = UIState
    { _uiFocusRing :: FocusRing WidgetName
    -- ^ Focus ring for widget navigation
    , _currentTab :: Tab
    -- ^ Currently active tab
    , _helpContent :: [Text]
    -- ^ Help text content lines
    , _turnNavigation :: Maybe TurnNavigationState
    -- ^ When Just, we are in turn navigation mode
    , _queuedMessagesFocus :: Maybe Int
    -- ^ Index of currently selected queued message
    , _attachedFiles :: Map ConversationId [MediaAttachment]
    -- ^ Media attachments per conversation
    , _attachmentDialogState :: AttachmentDialogState
    -- ^ File attachment dialog state
    , _filePathInput :: Editor Text WidgetName
    -- ^ Editor for file path input
    , _selectedAttachmentIndex :: Maybe Int
    -- ^ Selected attachment index
    , _agentList :: List WidgetName TuiAgent
    -- ^ List widget for agents
    , _conversationList :: List WidgetName Conversation
    -- ^ List widget for conversations
    , _sessionList :: List WidgetName Session
    -- ^ List widget for saved sessions
    , _messageEditor :: Editor Text WidgetName
    -- ^ Editor for message input
    , _selectedAgentInfo :: Maybe TuiAgent
    -- ^ Currently selected agent for display
    , _statusMessage :: Maybe StatusMessage
    -- ^ Current status message (if any)
    , _zoomed :: Bool
    -- ^ Whether zoom mode is active
    , _quitConfirmationPending :: Bool
    -- ^ Whether quit confirmation is pending
    , _unreadConversations :: Set ConversationId
    -- ^ Set of conversations with unread messages
    , _fileBrowser :: Maybe (FileBrowser WidgetName)
    -- ^ File browser widget for attachments
    , _auxiliaryTasks :: [AuxiliaryTask]
    -- ^ Background tasks (e.g., external viewers)
    , _uiBufferedMessages :: Map ConversationId [Text]
    -- ^ Copy of buffered messages from Core for UI rendering
    }

makeLenses ''UIState

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- TUI State
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Complete TUI state combining core and UI components.
data TuiState = TuiState
    { _tuiCore :: TVar Core
    -- ^ Thread-safe core state
    , _tuiUI :: UIState
    -- ^ UI-specific state
    , _eventChan :: BChan AppEvent
    -- ^ Channel for application events
    , _sessionConfig :: SessionConfig
    -- ^ Session configuration
    }

makeLenses ''TuiState

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Initialization Functions
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Initialize UI state with default values.
initUIState :: [Text] -> [TuiAgent] -> UIState
initUIState helpText agents =
    UIState
        { _uiFocusRing = focusRing [AgentListWidget]
        , _currentTab = AgentsTab
        , _helpContent = helpText
        , _turnNavigation = Nothing
        , _queuedMessagesFocus = Nothing
        , _attachedFiles = Map.empty
        , _attachmentDialogState = AttachmentDialogClosed
        , _filePathInput = editorText FilePathInputWidget (Just 1) ""
        , _selectedAttachmentIndex = Nothing
        , _agentList = list AgentListWidget (Vector.fromList agents) 1
        , _conversationList = list ConversationListWidget Vector.empty 1
        , _sessionList = list SessionsListWidget Vector.empty 1
        , _messageEditor = editorText MessageEditorWidget Nothing ""
        , _selectedAgentInfo = listToMaybe agents
        , _statusMessage = Nothing
        , _zoomed = False
        , _quitConfirmationPending = False
        , _unreadConversations = Set.empty
        , _fileBrowser = Nothing
        , _auxiliaryTasks = []
        , _uiBufferedMessages = Map.empty
        }

-- | Initialize core state.
initCore :: IO Core
initCore = do
    bufferedVar <- newTVarIO Map.empty
    pure
        Core
            { coreConversations = []
            , coreAgentTools = []
            , coreBufferedMessages = bufferedVar
            , corePausedConversations = Set.empty
            }

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Utility Functions
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Update a conversation's session in a list of conversations.
updateConversationSession :: ConversationId -> Session -> [Conversation] -> [Conversation]
updateConversationSession targetConvId newSession =
    map
        ( \conv ->
            if conversationId conv == targetConvId
                then conv{conversationSession = Just newSession}
                else conv
        )

    , tuiTree :: OSAgentTree
    -- ^ The agent's tree structure
    , tuiNode :: OSAgentNode
    -- ^ The specific node for this agent
    , tuiSlug :: Text
    -- ^ The agent's slug
    }

-- | Manual Show instance for TuiAgent.
instance Show TuiAgent where
    show agent =
        "TuiAgent {tuiAgentId = "
            ++ show agent.tuiAgentId
            ++ ", tuiSlug = "
            ++ show agent.tuiSlug
            ++ ", tuiTree = <OSAgentTree>, tuiNode = <OSAgentNode>}"

-- | Legacy accessor for backward compatibility.
agentTree :: TuiAgent -> OSAgentTree
agentTree = tuiTree

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Multi-Agent Coordination Types
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Role definition for agents in multi-agent conversations.
data AgentRole
    = -- | Coordinates other agents
      AgentRole_Orchestrator
    | -- | Specialized agent with a specific role description
      AgentRole_Specialist Text
    | -- | General worker agent
      AgentRole_Worker
    | -- | Observes but doesn't initiate
      AgentRole_Observer
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-- | Configuration for an agent's role in multi-agent mode.
data AgentRoleConfig = AgentRoleConfig
    { arcAgentId :: AgentId
    , arcRole :: AgentRole
    , arcCanInitiate :: Bool
    -- ^ Whether this agent can start new conversations
    , arcSubscribesTo :: [AgentId]
    -- ^ Agents this agent listens to for messages
    }
    deriving (Show)

-- | Strategy for coordinating multiple agents.
data CoordinationStrategy
    = -- | Each agent takes turns
      CoordinationStrategy_RoundRobin
    | -- | One agent orchestrates others
      CoordinationStrategy_Hierarchical AgentId
    | -- | Agents collaborate freely
      CoordinationStrategy_Collaborative
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-- | Configuration for multi-agent conversations.
data MultiAgentConfig = MultiAgentConfig
    { maAgents :: [AgentRoleConfig]
    , maCoordinationStrategy :: CoordinationStrategy
    }
    deriving (Show)

-- | Message type for inter-agent communication.
data MessageType
    = -- | Direct message to specific agent
      MessageType_Direct
    | -- | Message to all subscribed agents
      MessageType_Broadcast
    | -- | Response to a previous message
      MessageType_Response
    | -- | Request for action from another agent
      MessageType_Request
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-- | Message sent between agents.
data InterAgentMessage = InterAgentMessage
    { iamFrom :: AgentId
    , iamTo :: AgentId
    , iamType :: MessageType
    , iamContent :: Value
    }
    deriving (Show)

-- | Agent bus for inter-agent communication.
newtype AgentBus = AgentBus
    { busChannels :: TVar (Map AgentId (TQueue InterAgentMessage))
    }

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Layout Configuration
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Layout modes for the TUI display.
data LayoutMode
    = -- | Single agent view (default)
      SingleAgent
    | -- | Split screen vertically
      SplitVertical
    | -- | Split screen horizontally
      SplitHorizontal
    | -- | Grid with rows and columns
      GridLayout Int Int
    | -- | Tabbed interface for switching between agents
      Tabbed
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-- | TUI configuration including layout and theme.
data TUIConfig = TUIConfig
    { tuiTheme :: Theme
    , tuiKeyBindings :: Map Key EventType
    , tuiLayout :: LayoutMode
    }
    deriving (Show)

-- | Theme configuration (placeholder - to be expanded).
newtype Theme = Theme {themeName :: Text}
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-- | Key type for keybindings.
newtype Key = Key Text
    deriving (Show, Eq, Ord)

-- | Event type for keybindings.
newtype EventType = EventType Text
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Conversation Types
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Status of a conversation regarding its execution state.
data ConversationStatus
    = -- | Conversation is currently running (agent is processing)
      ConversationStatus_Active
    | -- | Conversation is waiting for user input
      ConversationStatus_WaitingForInput
    | -- | Conversation is paused (blocks step iteration until unpaused)
      ConversationStatus_Paused
    deriving (Show, Eq)

{- | A conversation with an agent.

Conversations can be either root-level user-initiated conversations
or subcalls (nested agent invocations). Subcall conversations have
additional metadata for TUI visibility and lineage tracking.
-}
data Conversation = Conversation
    { conversationId :: ConversationId
    , conversationAgent :: TuiAgent
    , conversationThreadId :: Maybe ThreadId
    -- ^ Nothing for restored conversations that haven't been continued yet
    , conversationSession :: Maybe Session
    , conversationName :: Text
    , conversationChan :: BChan (Maybe UserQuery)
    , conversationStatus :: ConversationStatus
    -- ^ Current status of the conversation
    , conversationOnProgress :: OnSessionProgress
    -- ^ Callback for session progress updates
    , conversationIsSubcall :: Bool
    -- ^ Whether this is a subcall (nested agent invocation)
    , conversationParentId :: Maybe ConversationId
    -- ^ Parent conversation ID for subcalls (Nothing for root conversations)
    , conversationSubcallDepth :: Int
    -- ^ Subcall nesting depth (0 = root, 1+ = nested)
    }

-- | Manual Show instance for Conversation.
instance Show Conversation where
    show conv =
        "Conversation {conversationId = "
            ++ show conv.conversationId
            ++ ", conversationAgent = "
            ++ show conv.conversationAgent
            ++ ", conversationName = "
            ++ show conv.conversationName
            ++ ", conversationIsSubcall = "
            ++ show conv.conversationIsSubcall
            ++ ", conversationParentId = "
            ++ show conv.conversationParentId
            ++ ", ...}"

-- | Create a root-level conversation (not a subcall).
mkRootConversation ::
    ConversationId ->
    TuiAgent ->
    Maybe ThreadId ->
    Maybe Session ->
    Text ->
    BChan (Maybe UserQuery) ->
    ConversationStatus ->
    OnSessionProgress ->
    Conversation
mkRootConversation convId agent threadId session convName chan status onProgress =
    Conversation
        { conversationId = convId
        , conversationAgent = agent
        , conversationThreadId = threadId
        , conversationSession = session
        , conversationName = convName
        , conversationChan = chan
        , conversationStatus = status
        , conversationOnProgress = onProgress
        , conversationIsSubcall = False
        , conversationParentId = Nothing
        , conversationSubcallDepth = 0
        }

-- | Create a subcall conversation.
mkSubcallConversation ::
    ConversationId ->
    TuiAgent ->
    Maybe ThreadId ->
    Maybe Session ->
    Text ->
    BChan (Maybe UserQuery) ->
    ConversationStatus ->
    OnSessionProgress ->
    ConversationId ->
    -- ^ Parent conversation ID
    Int ->
    -- ^ Subcall depth
    Conversation
mkSubcallConversation convId agent threadId session convName chan status onProgress parentId depth =
    Conversation
        { conversationId = convId
        , conversationAgent = agent
        , conversationThreadId = threadId
        , conversationSession = session
        , conversationName = "↳ " <> convName
        , conversationChan = chan
        , conversationStatus = status
        , conversationOnProgress = onProgress
        , conversationIsSubcall = True
        , conversationParentId = Just parentId
        , conversationSubcallDepth = depth
        }

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Auxiliary Task Types
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Auxiliary tasks running in the background (e.g., external viewers).
data AuxiliaryTask
    = -- | External markdown viewer task
      Viewer
        { viewerAsync :: Async ()
        , viewerConversationId :: ConversationId
        , viewerSessionId :: SessionId
        }

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Session Configuration
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Configuration for TUI sessions.
data SessionConfig = SessionConfig
    { sessionStore :: SessionStore
    -- ^ Storage for sessions
    , sessionApiKeys :: LoadedApiKeys
    -- ^ API keys for agents
    }

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Core State
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

{- | Core state shared across the TUI.

This is stored in a TVar for thread-safe access. It contains
mutable state that needs to be accessed from multiple threads.
-}
data Core = Core
    { coreConversations :: [Conversation]
    -- ^ Active conversations
    , coreAgentTools :: [(AgentId, [ToolRegistration])]
    -- ^ Tools per agent for display
    , coreBufferedMessages :: TVar (Map ConversationId [Text])
    -- ^ Buffered messages per conversation (queued while agent is processing)
    , corePausedConversations :: Set ConversationId
    -- ^ Set of paused conversation IDs
    }

makeLenses ''Core

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- UI State
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

{- | UI-specific state for the TUI.

This contains all the visual/interaction state that doesn't need
to be thread-safe and is only accessed from the UI thread.
-}
data UIState = UIState
    { _uiFocusRing :: FocusRing WidgetName
    -- ^ Focus ring for widget navigation
    , _currentTab :: Tab
    -- ^ Currently active tab
    , _helpContent :: [Text]
    -- ^ Help text content lines
    , _turnNavigation :: Maybe TurnNavigationState
    -- ^ When Just, we are in turn navigation mode
    , _queuedMessagesFocus :: Maybe Int
    -- ^ Index of currently selected queued message
    , _attachedFiles :: Map ConversationId [MediaAttachment]
    -- ^ Media attachments per conversation
    , _attachmentDialogState :: AttachmentDialogState
    -- ^ File attachment dialog state
    , _filePathInput :: Editor Text WidgetName
    -- ^ Editor for file path input
    , _selectedAttachmentIndex :: Maybe Int
    -- ^ Selected attachment index
    , _agentList :: List WidgetName TuiAgent
    -- ^ List widget for agents
    , _conversationList :: List WidgetName Conversation
    -- ^ List widget for conversations
    , _sessionList :: List WidgetName Session
    -- ^ List widget for saved sessions
    , _messageEditor :: Editor Text WidgetName
    -- ^ Editor for message input
    , _selectedAgentInfo :: Maybe TuiAgent
    -- ^ Currently selected agent for display
    , _statusMessage :: Maybe StatusMessage
    -- ^ Current status message (if any)
    , _zoomed :: Bool
    -- ^ Whether zoom mode is active
    , _quitConfirmationPending :: Bool
    -- ^ Whether quit confirmation is pending
    , _unreadConversations :: Set ConversationId
    -- ^ Set of conversations with unread messages
    , _fileBrowser :: Maybe (FileBrowser WidgetName)
    -- ^ File browser widget for attachments
    , _auxiliaryTasks :: [AuxiliaryTask]
    -- ^ Background tasks (e.g., external viewers)
    , _uiBufferedMessages :: Map ConversationId [Text]
    -- ^ Copy of buffered messages from Core for UI rendering
    }

makeLenses ''UIState

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- TUI State
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Complete TUI state combining core and UI components.
data TuiState = TuiState
    { _tuiCore :: TVar Core
    -- ^ Thread-safe core state
    , _tuiUI :: UIState
    -- ^ UI-specific state
    , _eventChan :: BChan AppEvent
    -- ^ Channel for application events
    , _sessionConfig :: SessionConfig
    -- ^ Session configuration
    }

makeLenses ''TuiState

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Initialization Functions
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Initialize UI state with default values.
initUIState :: [Text] -> [TuiAgent] -> UIState
initUIState helpText agents =
    UIState
        { _uiFocusRing = focusRing [AgentListWidget]
        , _currentTab = AgentsTab
        , _helpContent = helpText
        , _turnNavigation = Nothing
        , _queuedMessagesFocus = Nothing
        , _attachedFiles = Map.empty
        , _attachmentDialogState = AttachmentDialogClosed
        , _filePathInput = editorText FilePathInputWidget (Just 1) ""
        , _selectedAttachmentIndex = Nothing
        , _agentList = list AgentListWidget (Vector.fromList agents) 1
        , _conversationList = list ConversationListWidget Vector.empty 1
        , _sessionList = list SessionsListWidget Vector.empty 1
        , _messageEditor = editorText MessageEditorWidget Nothing ""
        , _selectedAgentInfo = listToMaybe agents
        , _statusMessage = Nothing
        , _zoomed = False
        , _quitConfirmationPending = False
        , _unreadConversations = Set.empty
        , _fileBrowser = Nothing
        , _auxiliaryTasks = []
        , _uiBufferedMessages = Map.empty
        }

-- | Initialize core state.
initCore :: IO Core
initCore = do
    bufferedVar <- newTVarIO Map.empty
    pure
        Core
            { coreConversations = []
            , coreAgentTools = []
            , coreBufferedMessages = bufferedVar
            , corePausedConversations = Set.empty
            }

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Utility Functions
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Update a conversation's session in a list of conversations.
updateConversationSession :: ConversationId -> Session -> [Conversation] -> [Conversation]
updateConversationSession targetConvId newSession =
    map
        ( \conv ->
            if conversationId conv == targetConvId
                then conv{conversationSession = Just newSession}
                else conv
        )

975	-- | Handle queued message list events (selection and deletion).
976	handleQueuedMessageListEvent :: Vty.Event -> EventM N TuiState ()
977	handleQueuedMessageListEvent ev = do
978	    -- Check if we have a paused conversation with queued messages
979	    mConv <- getFocusedConversation
980	    case mConv of
981	        Nothing -> pure () -- No conversation, ignore events
982	        Just conv -> do
983	            -- Only allow queue management when paused
984	            if conversationStatus conv /= ConversationStatus_Paused
985	                then pure ()
986	                else do
987	                    let convId = conversationId conv
988	                    buffered <- use (tuiUI . uiBufferedMessages)
989	                    case Map.lookup convId buffered of
990	                        Nothing -> pure () -- No queued messages
991	                        Just msgs -> do
992	                            case ev of
993	                                -- Up arrow - navigate to previous message
994	                                Vty.EvKey Vty.KUp [] -> do
995	                                    current <- use (tuiUI . queuedMessagesFocus)
996	                                    let count = length msgs
997	                                        newIdx = case current of
998	                                            Nothing -> count - 1 -- Start at last message
999	                                            Just idx -> max 0 (idx - 1)
1000	                                    tuiUI . queuedMessagesFocus .= Just newIdx
1001	
1002	                                -- Down arrow - navigate to next message
1003	                                Vty.EvKey Vty.KDown [] -> do
1004	                                    current <- use (tuiUI . queuedMessagesFocus)
1005	                                    let count = length msgs
1006	                                        newIdx = case current of
1007	                                            Nothing -> 0 -- Start at first message
1008	                                            Just idx -> min (count - 1) (idx + 1)
1009	                                    tuiUI . queuedMessagesFocus .= Just newIdx
1010	
1011	                                -- Delete key - delete selected message
1012	                                Vty.EvKey Vty.KDel [] -> do
1013	                                    handleDeleteSelectedMessage
1014	
1015	                                -- Backspace key - delete selected message
1016	                                Vty.EvKey Vty.KBS [] -> do
1017	                                    handleDeleteSelectedMessage
1018	
1019	                                -- Ctrl+D - clear all messages
1020	                                Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 'd') [Vty.MCtrl] -> do
1021	                                    handleClearQueuedMessages
1022	
1023	                                -- Ignore other events
1024	                                _ -> pure ()
1025	
1026	-- | Handle attachment list events.
1027	handleAttachmentListEvent :: Vty.Event -> EventM N TuiState ()
1028	handleAttachmentListEvent ev = do
1029	    mConv <- getFocusedConversation
1030	    case mConv of
1031	        Nothing -> pure () -- No conversation, ignore events
1032	        Just conv -> do
1033	            let convId = conversationId conv
1034	            attachments <- use (tuiUI . attachedFiles)
1035	            case Map.lookup convId attachments of
1036	                Nothing -> pure () -- No attachments
1037	                Just atts -> do
1038	                    case ev of
1039	                        -- Up arrow - navigate to previous attachment
1040	                        Vty.EvKey Vty.KUp [] -> do
1041	                            current <- use (tuiUI . selectedAttachmentIndex)
1042	                            let count = length atts
1043	                                newIdx = case current of
1044	                                    Nothing -> count - 1 -- Start at last attachment
1045	                                    Just idx -> max 0 (idx - 1)
1046	                            tuiUI . selectedAttachmentIndex .= Just newIdx
1047	
1048	                        -- Down arrow - navigate to next attachment
1049	                        Vty.EvKey Vty.KDown [] -> do
1050	                            current <- use (tuiUI . selectedAttachmentIndex)
1051	                            let count = length atts
1052	                                newIdx = case current of
1053	                                    Nothing -> 0 -- Start at first attachment
1054	                                    Just idx -> min (count - 1) (idx + 1)
1055	                            tuiUI . selectedAttachmentIndex .= Just newIdx
1056	
1057	                        -- Delete key - remove selected attachment
1058	                        Vty.EvKey Vty.KDel [] -> do
1059	                            handleRemoveSelectedAttachment
1060	
1061	                        -- Backspace key - remove selected attachment
1062	                        Vty.EvKey Vty.KBS [] -> do
1063	                            handleRemoveSelectedAttachment
1064	
1065	                        -- Ignore other events
1066	                        _ -> pure ()
1067	
1068	-- | Remove the currently selected attachment.
1069	handleRemoveSelectedAttachment :: EventM N TuiState ()
1070	handleRemoveSelectedAttachment = do
1071	    mConv <- getFocusedConversation
1072	    case mConv of
1073	        Nothing -> showStatus StatusWarning "No conversation selected"
1074	        Just conv -> do
1075	            let convId = conversationId conv
1076	            mSelectedIdx <- use (tuiUI . selectedAttachmentIndex)
1077	            case mSelectedIdx of
1078	                Nothing -> showStatus StatusWarning "Select an attachment first (use Up/Down arrows)"
1079	                Just idx -> do
1080	                    -- Get current attachments
1081	                    attachments <- use (tuiUI . attachedFiles)
1082	                    case Map.lookup convId attachments of
1083	                        Nothing -> pure ()
1084	                        Just atts ->
1085	                            if idx < 0 || idx >= length atts
1086	                                then pure ()
1087	                                else do
1088	                                    -- Remove attachment at index
1089	                                    let newAtts = deleteAt idx atts
1090	                                    -- Update attachments
1091	                                    tuiUI . attachedFiles %= Map.insert convId newAtts
1092	                                    -- Adjust selection
1093	                                    let newIdx = if null newAtts then Nothing else Just (min idx (length newAtts - 1))
1094	                                    tuiUI . selectedAttachmentIndex .= newIdx
1095	                                    showStatus StatusInfo "Attachment removed"
1096	
1097	-- | Clear all attachments for the current conversation.
1098	handleClearAllAttachments :: EventM N TuiState ()
1099	handleClearAllAttachments = do
1100	    mConv <- getFocusedConversation

1700	-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1701	-- Run Conversation
1702	-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
1703	
1704	runConversation :: Tracer IO Trace -> TuiAgent -> Session -> EventM N TuiState ()
1705	runConversation tracer baseTuiAgent session = do
1706	    -- Get session configuration (includes API keys)
1707	    config <- use sessionConfig
1708	
1709	    -- Generate conversation ID
1710	    convId <- liftIO $ newConversationId
1711	
1712	    outChan <- use eventChan
1713	    inChan <- liftIO $ newBChan 100
1714	
1715	    -- Build the progress callback
1716	    let notifyProgress = buildOnProgress convId outChan
1717	
1718	    let node = tuiNode baseTuiAgent
1719	
1720	    -- Create the agent with the progress callback
1721	    -- Use the agent's OSAgentNode through the TuiAgent
1722	    -- Pass API keys from the session config
1723	    agent0 <- liftIO $ nodeToAgent config.sessionStore Nothing convId (contramap OneShotTrace tracer) config.sessionApiKeys node
1724	    agent1 <- liftIO $ agentEvaluateActiveTools (contramap (OneShotTrace . mapProgressiveDisclosureTrace) tracer) (osNodeTools node) agent0
1725	
1726	    -- Get reference to core state for pause checking and message buffering
1727	    coreRef <- use tuiCore
1728	
1729	    let notifyNeedInput = writeBChan outChan (AppEvent_AgentNeedsInput convId)
1730	    let a =
1731	            agent1
1732	                { step = \sess -> do
1733	                    -- Check if conversation is paused and block until unpaused
1734	                    let waitIfPaused = do
1735	                            core <- readTVarIO coreRef
1736	                            when (isConversationPaused convId core) $ do
1737	                                threadDelay 200000 -- Check every 200ms
1738	                                waitIfPaused
1739	                    waitIfPaused
1740	
1741	                    notifyProgress (SessionUpdated sess)
1742	                    ret <- agent1.step sess
1743	                    case ret of
1744	                        Stop _r ->
1745	                            -- smoll hack to reuse the naive step from nodeToAgent
1746	                            pure $ AskUserPrompt (MissingUserPrompt True [])
1747	                        _ -> pure ret
1748	                , usrQuery = do
1749	                    -- First check for buffered messages
1750	                    core <- readTVarIO coreRef
1751	                    buffered <- readAndClearBufferedMessages convId core
1752	                    case buffered of
1753	                        Nothing -> notifyNeedInput >> readBChan inChan
1754	                        Just buftxt -> pure (Just $ UserQuery buftxt [])
1755	                }
1756	
1757	    -- \* wrap in Conversation
1758	    let tuiAgent = TuiAgent (tuiAgentId baseTuiAgent) (tuiTree baseTuiAgent) (tuiNode baseTuiAgent) (tuiSlug baseTuiAgent)
1759	    threadId <- liftIO $ forkIO $ do
1760	        notifyProgress (SessionStarted session)
1761	        -- Loop.run now requires convId as first parameter
1762	        void $ Loop.run convId a session
1763	        notifyProgress (SessionCompleted session)
1764	    let conv =
1765	            Conversation
1766	                { conversationId = convId
1767	                , conversationAgent = tuiAgent
1768	                , conversationThreadId = Just threadId
1769	                , conversationSession = Nothing
1770	                , conversationName = "@" <> tuiSlug baseTuiAgent
1771	                , conversationChan = inChan
1772	                , conversationStatus = ConversationStatus_WaitingForInput
1773	                , conversationOnProgress = notifyProgress
1774	                }
1775	
1776	    -- Add to core
1777	    liftIO $ atomically $ modifyTVar coreRef $ \c ->
1778	        c{coreConversations = conv : coreConversations c}
1779	    -- Update UI
1780	    tuiUI . conversationList %= listInsert 0 conv
1781	    tuiUI . conversationList . listSelectedL .= Just 0
1782	    -- Switch to Chats tab and focus the message editor
1783	    switchToChatsAndFocusMessage
1784	
1785	{- | Send a message in the current conversation.
1786	Messages are now buffered if the conversation is being processed by an agent,
1787	allowing users to "interrupt" or provide additional context while the agent
1788	is executing tool calls.
1789	-}
1790	handleSendMessage :: EventM N TuiState ()
1791	handleSendMessage = do
1792	    -- Get message text
1793	    msgLines <- use (tuiUI . messageEditor . to getEditContents)
1794	    let msgText = Text.strip $ Text.unlines msgLines
1795	
1796	    -- Get current attachments
1797	    mConv <- getFocusedConversation
1798	    attachments <- case mConv of
1799	        Just conv -> do
1800	            atts <- use (tuiUI . attachedFiles)
1801	            pure $ Map.findWithDefault [] (conversationId conv) atts
1802	        Nothing -> pure []
1803	
1804	    -- Only send non-empty messages (or messages with attachments)
1805	    when (not (Text.null msgText) || not (null attachments)) $ do
1806	        case mConv of
1807	            Just conv -> do
1808	1813

You are an expert Haskell and Bash programmer specialized in writing clean, idiomatic, and efficient Haskell code.

584	-- Turn Navigation Event Handler
585	-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

587	-- | Handle events when in turn navigation mode.
588	590	-- | Handle events when in turn navigation mode.
589	591	handleTurnNavigationEvent :: Tracer IO Trace -> TurnNavigationState -> BrickEvent N AppEvent -> EventM N TuiState ()
590	592	handleTurnNavigationEvent tracer navState ev =
591	593	    case ev of
592	594	        -- Application events pass through
593	595	        AppEvent AppEvent_Heartbeat ->
594	596	            handleHeartbeat
595	597	        AppEvent (AppEvent_AgentStepProgrress convId sess) ->
596	598	            handleConversationUpdated convId sess
597	599	        AppEvent (AppEvent_AgentNeedsInput convId) ->
598	600	            handleConversationNeedsInput convId
599	601	        AppEvent (AppEvent_AgentTrace _) ->
600	602	            pure ()
601	603	        AppEvent (AppEvent_ShowStatus severity text) ->
602	604	            handleShowStatus severity text
603	605	        AppEvent AppEvent_ClearStatus ->
604	606	            handleClearStatus
605	606	        -- Subcall events
606	607	        AppEvent (AppEvent_SubcallStarted parentId subcallId slug depth) ->
607	608	            handleSubcallStarted parentId subcallId slug depth
608	609	        AppEvent (AppEvent_SubcallProgress subcallId sess) ->
609	610	            handleSubcallProgress subcallId sess
610	611	        AppEvent (AppEvent_SubcallCompleted subcallId result) ->
611	612	            handleSubcallCompleted subcallId result
612	613	        AppEvent (AppEvent_SubcallFailed subcallId err) ->
613	614	            handleSubcallFailed subcallId err
614	615	        -- Exit navigation mode with Enter
615	616	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey Vty.KEnter []) -> do
616	617	            tuiUI . turnNavigation .= Nothing
617	618	            showStatus StatusInfo "Exited turn navigation"
618	619	            resetQuitConfirmation
619	620	
620	621	        -- Also allow Esc to exit
621	622	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey Vty.KEsc []) -> do
622	623	            tuiUI . turnNavigation .= Nothing
623	624	            showStatus StatusInfo "Exited turn navigation"
624	625	            resetQuitConfirmation
625	
626	        -- Also allow Esc to exit
627	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey Vty.KEsc []) -> do
628	            tuiUI . turnNavigation .= Nothing
629	            showStatus StatusInfo "Exited turn navigation"
630	            resetQuitConfirmation
631	
632	        -- Navigate up (to earlier turns)
633	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey Vty.KUp []) -> do
634	            let currentIdx = navState ^. navSelectedTurnIndex
635	                newIdx = max 0 (currentIdx - 1)
636	            tuiUI . turnNavigation .= Just (navState{_navSelectedTurnIndex = newIdx})
637	
638	        -- Navigate down (to later turns)
639	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey Vty.KDown []) -> do
640	            let currentIdx = navState ^. navSelectedTurnIndex
641	                maxIdx = (navState ^. navTotalTurns) - 1
642	                newIdx = min maxIdx (currentIdx + 1)
643	            tuiUI . turnNavigation .= Just (navState{_navSelectedTurnIndex = newIdx})
644	
645	        -- Fork at current turn
646	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 'f') []) -> do
647	            handleForkAtTurn tracer navState
648	
649	        -- Fork at current turn (uppercase F)
650	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 'F') []) -> do
651	            handleForkAtTurn tracer navState
652	
653	        -- Ignore other events in navigation mode
654	        _ -> pure ()
655	
656	-- | Fork a new conversation at the selected turn.
657	handleForkAtTurn :: Tracer IO Trace -> TurnNavigationState -> EventM N TuiState ()
658	handleForkAtTurn tracer navState = do
659	    let session = navState ^. navSession
660	        selectedIdx = navState ^. navSelectedTurnIndex
661	        originalSessionId = session.sessionId
662	
663	    -- Create forked session with dropping unwanted turns
664	    let turnsToKeep = drop selectedIdx session.turns
665	
666	    -- Generate new session ID and turn ID
667	    newSessionId' <- liftIO newSessionId
668	    newTurnId' <- liftIO newTurnId
669	
670	    let forkedSession =
671	            Session
672	                { turns = turnsToKeep
673	                , sessionId = newSessionId'
674	                , forkedFromSessionId = Just originalSessionId
675	                , turnId = newTurnId'
676	                , sessionVersion = Just 1 -- Media support enabled
677	                }
678	
679	    -- Create a new conversation with this session
680	    mAgent <- use (tuiUI . agentList . to listSelectedElement)
681	    case mAgent of
682	        Just (_, baseTuiAgent) -> do
683	            -- Start conversation with forked session
684	            runConversation tracer baseTuiAgent forkedSession
685	
686	            -- Show status
687	            showStatus StatusInfo $
688	690	-- | Handle normal (non-navigation) events.

690	692	handleNormalEvent tracer ev = do

692	694	        -- Application events
693	695	        AppEvent AppEvent_Heartbeat ->
694	696	            handleHeartbeat
695	697	        AppEvent (AppEvent_AgentStepProgrress convId sess) ->
696	698	            handleConversationUpdated convId sess

723	        AppEvent (AppEvent_AgentTrace _) ->

739	            handleQuit

747	            resetQuitConfirmation
748	            handleRefreshTools
749	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 'z') [Vty.MCtrl]) -> do
750	            resetQuitConfirmation

750	            resetQuitConfirmation
751	            toggleZoom
752	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 'n') [Vty.MCtrl]) -> do
753	            resetQuitConfirmation
754	            handleNewConversationFromEditor tracer
755	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 'c') [Vty.MCtrl]) -> do
756	            resetQuitConfirmation

771	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 'v') [Vty.MCtrl]) -> do
772	            resetQuitConfirmation

776	            resetQuitConfirmation

778	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 't') [Vty.MCtrl]) -> do
779	            resetQuitConfirmation
780	            handleViewSessionWithExternalViewer Chronological
781	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 'r') [Vty.MCtrl]) -> do
782	            resetQuitConfirmation

784	        -- Queue management: Ctrl+D to clear all queued messages
785	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey (Vty.KChar 'd') [Vty.MCtrl]) -> do
786	            resetQuitConfirmation

788	        -- Delegate to focused widget
789	        VtyEvent vtyEv -> do

792	            case currentFocus of

795	                Just SessionsListWidget ->

797	                Just ConversationListWidget ->

799	                Just MessageEditorWidget ->

801	                Just ConversationViewWidget ->
802	                    handleConversationViewEvent tracer vtyEv
803	                Just SessionViewWidget ->
804	                    handleSessionViewEvent tracer vtyEv
805	                Just AgentInfoWidget ->

807	                Just QueuedMessageListWidget ->
808	                    handleQueuedMessageListEvent vtyEv
809	                Just AttachmentListWidget ->

811	                _ ->
812	                    pure ()
813	        _ -> pure ()
814	
815	-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
816	-- Widget-Specific Event Handlers
817	-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
818	
819	-- | Handle agent list navigation.
820	handleAgentListEvent :: Vty.Event -> EventM N TuiState ()
821	handleAgentListEvent ev = do
822	    zoom (tuiUI . agentList) $ handleListEvent ev
823	    -- Update selected agent info when selection changes
824	    selected <- use (tuiUI . agentList . to listSelectedElement)
825	    case selected of
826	        Just (_, agent) -> do
827	            tuiUI . selectedAgentInfo .= Just agent
828	            -- Refresh tools for the newly selected agent
829	            refreshToolsForAgent agent
830	        Nothing -> pure ()
831	
832	-- | Handle conversation list navigation.
833	handleConversationListEvent :: Vty.Event -> EventM N TuiState ()
834	handleConversationListEvent ev =
835	    case ev of
836	        -- Enter key opens the selected conversation (switches to Chats tab and focuses message)
837	        Vty.EvKey Vty.KEnter [] -> do
838	            mSelected <- use (tuiUI . conversationList . to listSelectedElement)
839	            case mSelected of
840	                Just (_, conv) -> do
841	                    -- Switch to Chats tab and focus message editor
842	                    switchToChatsAndFocusMessage
843	                    -- Mark conversation as read
844	                    tuiUI . unreadConversations %= Set.delete (conversationId conv)
845	                Nothing -> pure ()
846	        -- Normal navigation
847	        _ -> do
848	            zoom (tuiUI . conversationList) $ handleListEvent ev
849	            -- Mark conversation as read when selected
850	            selected <- use (tuiUI . conversationList . to listSelectedElement)
851	            case selected of
852	                Just (_, conv) ->
853	                    tuiUI . unreadConversations %= Set.delete (conversationId conv)
854	                Nothing -> pure ()
855	
856	-- | Handle sessions list navigation.
857	handleSessionsListEvent :: Vty.Event -> EventM N TuiState ()
858	handleSessionsListEvent ev = do
859	    zoom (tuiUI . sessionList) $ handleListEvent ev
860	
861	-- | Handle message editor events.
862	handleMessageEditorEvent :: BrickEvent N AppEvent -> EventM N TuiState ()
863	handleMessageEditorEvent ev = do
864	    zoom (tuiUI . messageEditor) $ handleEditorEvent ev
865	    -- Check for special key combinations
866	    case ev of
867	        VtyEvent (Vty.EvKey Vty.KEnter mods)
868	            | Vty.MCtrl `elem` mods -> handleSendMessage
869	        _ -> pure ()
870	
871	-- | Handle conversation view scrolling and queue management.
872	handleConversationViewEvent :: Tracer IO Trace -> Vty.Event -> EventM N TuiState ()
873	handleConversationViewEvent _tracer ev = do
874	    -- Check if we have a paused conversation with queued messages
875	    mConv <- getFocusedConversation
876	    hasQueuedMessages <- case mConv of
877	        Just conv -> do
878	            buffered <- use (tuiUI . uiBufferedMessages)
879	            pure $ case Map.lookup (conversationId conv) buffered of
880	                Just msgs | conversationStatus conv == ConversationStatus_Paused -> not (null msgs)
881	                _ -> False
882	        Nothing -> pure False
883	
884	    case ev of
885	        -- Enter key enters turn navigation mode
886	        Vty.EvKey Vty.KEnter [] -> do
887	            mSession <- getFocusedSession
888	            case mSession of
889	                Just session | not (null session.turns) -> do
890	                    let navState =
891	                            TurnNavigationState
892	                                { _navSession = session
893	                                , _navSelectedTurnIndex = length session.turns - 1 -- Start at most recent
894	                                , _navTotalTurns = length session.turns
895	                                }
896	                    tuiUI . turnNavigation .= Just navState
897	                    showStatus StatusInfo "Navigation mode: Up/Down to navigate, F to fork, Enter/Esc to exit"
898	                _ ->
899	                    showStatus StatusWarning "No session or empty session to navigate"
900	        -- Queue management: Up arrow for navigation (only when paused with queued messages)

userToolResponses.content:
----
{-# LANGUAGE OverloadedRecordDot #-}
{-# LANGUAGE OverloadedStrings #-}
{-# LANGUAGE TemplateHaskell #-}

-- | Core types and data structures for the TUI application.
module System.Agents.TUI.Types where

import Brick.BChan (BChan)
import Brick.Focus (FocusRing, focusRing)
import Brick.Widgets.Edit (Editor, editorText)
import Brick.Widgets.FileBrowser (FileBrowser)
import Brick.Widgets.List (List, list)
import Control.Concurrent (ThreadId)
import Control.Concurrent.Async (Async)
import Control.Concurrent.STM (TQueue, TVar, newTVarIO)
import Control.Lens (makeLenses)
import Data.Aeson (Value)
import Data.Map.Strict (Map)
import qualified Data.Map.Strict as Map
import Data.Maybe (listToMaybe)
import Data.Set (Set)
import qualified Data.Set as Set
import Data.Text (Text)
import Data.Time (UTCTime)
import qualified Data.Vector as Vector

import System.Agents.AgentTree (LoadedApiKeys, OSAgentNode, OSAgentTree)
import System.Agents.Base (AgentId, ConversationId (..))
import System.Agents.Media.Types (MediaAttachment)
import System.Agents.Runtime.Trace (Trace)
import System.Agents.Session.Base
import System.Agents.SessionStore (SessionStore)
import System.Agents.ToolRegistration (ToolRegistration)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Widget Names
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Widget names for the TUI focus ring and viewport management.
data WidgetName
    = -- | Agent list in the left sidebar
      AgentListWidget
    | -- | Agent information/details panel
      AgentInfoWidget
    | -- | Conversation list in the left sidebar
      ConversationListWidget
    | -- | Saved sessions list in the History tab
      SessionsListWidget
    | -- | Message editor input area
      MessageEditorWidget
    | -- | Main conversation display viewport
      ConversationViewWidget
    | -- | Session content display viewport
      SessionViewWidget
    | -- | For viewport scrolling during turn navigation
      TurnNavigationWidget
    | -- | For focusing the queued messages list
      QueuedMessageListWidget
    | -- | For the attachment list below the message editor
      AttachmentListWidget
    | -- | For the file path input dialog
      FilePathInputWidget
    deriving (Show, Eq, Ord)

-- | Type alias for widget names.
type N = WidgetName

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Tab Types
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Tabs available in the TUI interface.
data Tab
    = AgentsTab
    | ChatsTab
    | HistoryTab
    | HelpTab
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Status Message Types
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Severity level for status messages.
data StatusSeverity
    = StatusInfo
    | StatusWarning
    | StatusError
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-- | A status message with timestamp for auto-clear logic.
data StatusMessage = StatusMessage
    { statusText :: Text
    , statusSeverity :: StatusSeverity
    , statusTimestamp :: UTCTime
    }
    deriving (Show)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Turn Navigation Types
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | State for turn-by-turn navigation
data TurnNavigationState = TurnNavigationState
    { _navSession :: Session
    -- ^ The session being navigated
    , _navSelectedTurnIndex :: Int
    -- ^ Currently selected turn index (0-based)
    , _navTotalTurns :: Int
    -- ^ Total number of turns for display
    }
    deriving (Show)

makeLenses ''TurnNavigationState

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Attachment Dialog State
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | State for the file attachment dialog
data AttachmentDialogState
    = -- | No dialog is open
      AttachmentDialogClosed
    | -- | Path input dialog is open (legacy text input)
      AttachmentDialogPathInput
    | -- | FileBrowser widget dialog is open
      AttachmentDialogFileBrowser
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Application Events
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Events that can be sent to the TUI application.
data AppEvent
    = AppEvent_Heartbeat
    | AppEvent_AgentStepProgrress ConversationId Session
    | AppEvent_AgentNeedsInput ConversationId
    | AppEvent_AgentTrace Trace
    | AppEvent_ShowStatus StatusSeverity Text
    | AppEvent_ClearStatus
    | -- ** Subcall Events for TUI visibility
      -- | A subcall conversation has started
      AppEvent_SubcallStarted
        { appSubcallParentId :: ConversationId
        , appSubcallId :: ConversationId
        , appSubcallAgentSlug :: Text
        , appSubcallDepth :: Int
        }
    | -- | A subcall has made progress
      AppEvent_SubcallProgress ConversationId Session
    | -- | A subcall has completed successfully
      AppEvent_SubcallCompleted ConversationId Text
    | -- | A subcall has failed
      AppEvent_SubcallFailed ConversationId Text
    deriving (Show)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Agent Types (OS-Native)
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

{- | TUI Agent using OS-native structures.

This structure wraps an OSAgentNode for use in the TUI.
Tools are accessed directly from the node's tools TVar.
-}
data TuiAgent = TuiAgent
    { tuiAgentId :: AgentId
    -- ^ Unique identifier for this agent
    , tuiTree :: OSAgentTree
    -- ^ The agent's tree structure
    , tuiNode :: OSAgentNode
    -- ^ The specific node for this agent
    , tuiSlug :: Text
    -- ^ The agent's slug
    }

-- | Manual Show instance for TuiAgent.
instance Show TuiAgent where
    show agent =
        "TuiAgent {tuiAgentId = "
            ++ show agent.tuiAgentId
            ++ ", tuiSlug = "
            ++ show agent.tuiSlug
            ++ ", tuiTree = <OSAgentTree>, tuiNode = <OSAgentNode>}"

-- | Legacy accessor for backward compatibility.
agentTree :: TuiAgent -> OSAgentTree
agentTree = tuiTree

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Multi-Agent Coordination Types
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Role definition for agents in multi-agent conversations.
data AgentRole
    = -- | Coordinates other agents
      AgentRole_Orchestrator
    | -- | Specialized agent with a specific role description
      AgentRole_Specialist Text
    | -- | General worker agent
      AgentRole_Worker
    | -- | Observes but doesn't initiate
      AgentRole_Observer
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-- | Configuration for an agent's role in multi-agent mode.
data AgentRoleConfig = AgentRoleConfig
    { arcAgentId :: AgentId
    , arcRole :: AgentRole
    , arcCanInitiate :: Bool
    -- ^ Whether this agent can start new conversations
    , arcSubscribesTo :: [AgentId]
    -- ^ Agents this agent listens to for messages
    }
    deriving (Show)

-- | Strategy for coordinating multiple agents.
data CoordinationStrategy
    = -- | Each agent takes turns
      CoordinationStrategy_RoundRobin
    | -- | One agent orchestrates others
      CoordinationStrategy_Hierarchical AgentId
    | -- | Agents collaborate freely
      CoordinationStrategy_Collaborative
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-- | Configuration for multi-agent conversations.
data MultiAgentConfig = MultiAgentConfig
    { maAgents :: [AgentRoleConfig]
    , maCoordinationStrategy :: CoordinationStrategy
    }
    deriving (Show)

-- | Message type for inter-agent communication.
data MessageType
    = -- | Direct message to specific agent
      MessageType_Direct
    | -- | Message to all subscribed agents
      MessageType_Broadcast
    | -- | Response to a previous message
      MessageType_Response
    | -- | Request for action from another agent
      MessageType_Request
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-- | Message sent between agents.
data InterAgentMessage = InterAgentMessage
    { iamFrom :: AgentId
    , iamTo :: AgentId
    , iamType :: MessageType
    , iamContent :: Value
    }
    deriving (Show)

-- | Agent bus for inter-agent communication.
newtype AgentBus = AgentBus
    { busChannels :: TVar (Map AgentId (TQueue InterAgentMessage))
    }

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Layout Configuration
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Layout modes for the TUI display.
data LayoutMode
    = -- | Single agent view (default)
      SingleAgent
    | -- | Split screen vertically
      SplitVertical
    | -- | Split screen horizontally
      SplitHorizontal
    | -- | Grid with rows and columns
      GridLayout Int Int
    | -- | Tabbed interface for switching between agents
      Tabbed
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-- | TUI configuration including layout and theme.
data TUIConfig = TUIConfig
    { tuiTheme :: Theme
    , tuiKeyBindings :: Map Key EventType
    , tuiLayout :: LayoutMode
    }
    deriving (Show)

-- | Theme configuration (placeholder - to be expanded).
newtype Theme = Theme {themeName :: Text}
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-- | Key type for keybindings.
newtype Key = Key Text
    deriving (Show, Eq, Ord)

-- | Event type for keybindings.
newtype EventType = EventType Text
    deriving (Show, Eq)

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Conversation Types
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Status of a conversation regarding its execution state.
data ConversationStatus
    = -- | Conversation is currently running (agent is processing)
      ConversationStatus_Active
    | -- | Conversation is waiting for user input
      ConversationStatus_WaitingForInput
    | -- | Conversation is paused (blocks step iteration until unpaused)
      ConversationStatus_Paused
    deriving (Show, Eq)

{- | A conversation with an agent.

Conversations can be either root-level user-initiated conversations
or subcalls (nested agent invocations). Subcall conversations have
additional metadata for TUI visibility and lineage tracking.
-}
data Conversation = Conversation
    { conversationId :: ConversationId
    , conversationAgent :: TuiAgent
    , conversationThreadId :: Maybe ThreadId
    -- ^ Nothing for restored conversations that haven't been continued yet
    , conversationSession :: Maybe Session
    , conversationName :: Text
    , conversationChan :: BChan (Maybe UserQuery)
    , conversationStatus :: ConversationStatus
    -- ^ Current status of the conversation
    , conversationOnProgress :: OnSessionProgress
    -- ^ Callback for session progress updates
    , conversationIsSubcall :: Bool
    -- ^ Whether this is a subcall (nested agent invocation)
    , conversationParentId :: Maybe ConversationId
    -- ^ Parent conversation ID for subcalls (Nothing for root conversations)
    , conversationSubcallDepth :: Int
    -- ^ Subcall nesting depth (0 = root, 1+ = nested)
    }

-- | Manual Show instance for Conversation.
instance Show Conversation where
    show conv =
        "Conversation {conversationId = "
            ++ show conv.conversationId
            ++ ", conversationAgent = "
            ++ show conv.conversationAgent
            ++ ", conversationName = "
            ++ show conv.conversationName
            ++ ", conversationIsSubcall = "
            ++ show conv.conversationIsSubcall
            ++ ", conversationParentId = "
            ++ show conv.conversationParentId
            ++ ", ...}"

-- | Create a root-level conversation (not a subcall).
mkRootConversation ::
    ConversationId ->
    TuiAgent ->
    Maybe ThreadId ->
    Maybe Session ->
    Text ->
    BChan (Maybe UserQuery) ->
    ConversationStatus ->
    OnSessionProgress ->
    Conversation
mkRootConversation convId agent threadId session convName chan status onProgress =
    Conversation
        { conversationId = convId
        , conversationAgent = agent
        , conversationThreadId = threadId
        , conversationSession = session
        , conversationName = convName
        , conversationChan = chan
        , conversationStatus = status
        , conversationOnProgress = onProgress
        , conversationIsSubcall = False
        , conversationParentId = Nothing
        , conversationSubcallDepth = 0
        }

-- | Create a subcall conversation.
mkSubcallConversation ::
    ConversationId ->
    TuiAgent ->
    Maybe ThreadId ->
    Maybe Session ->
    Text ->
    BChan (Maybe UserQuery) ->
    ConversationStatus ->
    OnSessionProgress ->
    ConversationId ->
    -- ^ Parent conversation ID
    Int ->
    -- ^ Subcall depth
    Conversation
mkSubcallConversation convId agent threadId session convName chan status onProgress parentId depth =
    Conversation
        { conversationId = convId
        , conversationAgent = agent
        , conversationThreadId = threadId
        , conversationSession = session
        , conversationName = "↳ " <> convName
        , conversationChan = chan
        , conversationStatus = status
        , conversationOnProgress = onProgress
        , conversationIsSubcall = True
        , conversationParentId = Just parentId
        , conversationSubcallDepth = depth
        }

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Auxiliary Task Types
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Auxiliary tasks running in the background (e.g., external viewers).
data AuxiliaryTask
    = -- | External markdown viewer task
      Viewer
        { viewerAsync :: Async ()
        , viewerConversationId :: ConversationId
        , viewerSessionId :: SessionId
        }

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Session Configuration
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Configuration for TUI sessions.
data SessionConfig = SessionConfig
    { sessionStore :: SessionStore
    -- ^ Storage for sessions
    , sessionApiKeys :: LoadedApiKeys
    -- ^ API keys for agents
    }

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Core State
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

{- | Core state shared across the TUI.

This is stored in a TVar for thread-safe access. It contains
mutable state that needs to be accessed from multiple threads.
-}
data Core = Core
    { coreConversations :: [Conversation]
    -- ^ Active conversations
    , coreAgentTools :: [(AgentId, [ToolRegistration])]
    -- ^ Tools per agent for display
    , coreBufferedMessages :: TVar (Map ConversationId [Text])
    -- ^ Buffered messages per conversation (queued while agent is processing)
    , corePausedConversations :: Set ConversationId
    -- ^ Set of paused conversation IDs
    }

makeLenses ''Core

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- UI State
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

{- | UI-specific state for the TUI.

This contains all the visual/interaction state that doesn't need
to be thread-safe and is only accessed from the UI thread.
-}
data UIState = UIState
    { _uiFocusRing :: FocusRing WidgetName
    -- ^ Focus ring for widget navigation
    , _currentTab :: Tab
    -- ^ Currently active tab
    , _helpContent :: [Text]
    -- ^ Help text content lines
    , _turnNavigation :: Maybe TurnNavigationState
    -- ^ When Just, we are in turn navigation mode
    , _queuedMessagesFocus :: Maybe Int
    -- ^ Index of currently selected queued message
    , _attachedFiles :: Map ConversationId [MediaAttachment]
    -- ^ Media attachments per conversation
    , _attachmentDialogState :: AttachmentDialogState
    -- ^ File attachment dialog state
    , _filePathInput :: Editor Text WidgetName
    -- ^ Editor for file path input
    , _selectedAttachmentIndex :: Maybe Int
    -- ^ Selected attachment index
    , _agentList :: List WidgetName TuiAgent
    -- ^ List widget for agents
    , _conversationList :: List WidgetName Conversation
    -- ^ List widget for conversations
    , _sessionList :: List WidgetName Session
    -- ^ List widget for saved sessions
    , _messageEditor :: Editor Text WidgetName
    -- ^ Editor for message input
    , _selectedAgentInfo :: Maybe TuiAgent
    -- ^ Currently selected agent for display
    , _statusMessage :: Maybe StatusMessage
    -- ^ Current status message (if any)
    , _zoomed :: Bool
    -- ^ Whether zoom mode is active
    , _quitConfirmationPending :: Bool
    -- ^ Whether quit confirmation is pending
    , _unreadConversations :: Set ConversationId
    -- ^ Set of conversations with unread messages
    , _fileBrowser :: Maybe (FileBrowser WidgetName)
    -- ^ File browser widget for attachments
    , _auxiliaryTasks :: [AuxiliaryTask]
    -- ^ Background tasks (e.g., external viewers)
    , _uiBufferedMessages :: Map ConversationId [Text]
    -- ^ Copy of buffered messages from Core for UI rendering
    }

makeLenses ''UIState

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- TUI State
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Complete TUI state combining core and UI components.
data TuiState = TuiState
    { _tuiCore :: TVar Core
    -- ^ Thread-safe core state
    , _tuiUI :: UIState
    -- ^ UI-specific state
    , _eventChan :: BChan AppEvent
    -- ^ Channel for application events
    , _sessionConfig :: SessionConfig
    -- ^ Session configuration
    }

makeLenses ''TuiState

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Initialization Functions
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Initialize UI state with default values.
initUIState :: [Text] -> [TuiAgent] -> UIState
initUIState helpText agents =
    UIState
        { _uiFocusRing = focusRing [AgentListWidget]
        , _currentTab = AgentsTab
        , _helpContent = helpText
        , _turnNavigation = Nothing
        , _queuedMessagesFocus = Nothing
        , _attachedFiles = Map.empty
        , _attachmentDialogState = AttachmentDialogClosed
        , _filePathInput = editorText FilePathInputWidget (Just 1) ""
        , _selectedAttachmentIndex = Nothing
        , _agentList = list AgentListWidget (Vector.fromList agents) 1
        , _conversationList = list ConversationListWidget Vector.empty 1
        , _sessionList = list SessionsListWidget Vector.empty 1
        , _messageEditor = editorText MessageEditorWidget Nothing ""
        , _selectedAgentInfo = listToMaybe agents
        , _statusMessage = Nothing
        , _zoomed = False
        , _quitConfirmationPending = False
        , _unreadConversations = Set.empty
        , _fileBrowser = Nothing
        , _auxiliaryTasks = []
        , _uiBufferedMessages = Map.empty
        }

-- | Initialize core state.
initCore :: IO Core
initCore = do
    bufferedVar <- newTVarIO Map.empty
    pure
        Core
            { coreConversations = []
            , coreAgentTools = []
            , coreBufferedMessages = bufferedVar
            , corePausedConversations = Set.empty
            }

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------
-- Utility Functions
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- | Update a conversation's session in a list of conversations.
updateConversationSession :: ConversationId -> Session -> [Conversation] -> [Conversation]
updateConversationSession targetConvId newSession =
    map
        ( \conv ->
            if conversationId conv == targetConvId
                then conv{conversationSession = Just newSession}
                else conv
        )
